headline: Zenlayer Named Equinix 2025 Global Partner of the Year
summary: LOS ANGELES, June 09, 2026--Zenlayer and Equinix expand their global collaboration to support distributed AI infrastructure worldwide.

headline: Sparkle enhances global wholesale network with Quantum-safe interconnect solution
summary: Telecom Italia’s Sparkle, together with Equinix launch its Quantum-safe interconnect (QSI) solution. Is quantum-safe connectivity the next major differentiator for wholesale operators seeking to move beyond connectivity?
